records.name: TreeViewContext
records.description: Cascaded once per tree (IsFixed) so recursively-rendered nodes can reach shared tree state: roving focus, search visibility, node ids.

mdSummary:
# TreeView

Hierarchical tree with expand/collapse and selection.

**Package:** `Lumeo` · **Category:** Data Display/Lists & Trees
**Docs:** https://lumeo.nativ.sh/components/tree-view

## Parameters
| Owner | Name | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| TreeView | Items | `List<TreeViewItem<T>>?` | `` |  |
| TreeView | ShowCheckboxes | `bool` | `` |  |
| TreeView | Expandable | `bool` | `true` |  |
| TreeView | OnItemClick | `EventCallback<TreeViewItem<T>>` | `` |  |
| TreeView | OnItemCheck | `EventCallback<TreeViewItem<T>>` | `` |  |
| TreeView | ShowSearch | `bool` | `` |  |
| TreeView | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| TreeView | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |
| TreeView | LoadChildren | `Func<TreeViewItem<T>, Task<List<TreeViewItem<T>>>>?` | `` |  |
| TreeView | CascadeCheck | `bool` | `true` |  |
| TreeView | CheckedValuesChanged | `EventCallback<List<T?>>` | `` |  |
| TreeView | NodeTemplate | `RenderFragment<TreeViewItem<T>>?` | `` |  |
| TreeView | ExpandAll | `bool` | `` |  |
| TreeView | MultiSelect | `bool` | `` |  |
| TreeView | SelectedValues | `List<T>?` | `` |  |
| TreeView | SelectedValuesChanged | `EventCallback<List<T>>` | `` |  |
| TreeViewNode | Context | `TreeView<T>.TreeViewContext?` | `` |  |
| TreeViewNode | Item | `TreeView<T>.TreeViewItem<T>` | `default!` |  |
| TreeViewNode | Level | `int` | `` |  |
| TreeViewNode | PosInSet | `int` | `1` |  |
| TreeViewNode | SetSize | `int` | `1` |  |
| TreeViewNode | ShowCheckboxes | `bool` | `` |  |
| TreeViewNode | Expandable | `bool` | `` |  |
| TreeViewNode | OnItemClick | `EventCallback<TreeView<T>.TreeViewItem<T>>` | `` |  |
| TreeViewNode | OnItemCheck | `EventCallback<TreeView<T>.TreeViewItem<T>>` | `` |  |
| TreeViewNode | CascadeCheck | `bool` | `` |  |
| TreeViewNode | MultiSelect | `bool` | `` |  |
| TreeViewNode | SelectedValues | `HashSet<T>?` | `` |  |
| TreeViewNode | NodeTemplate | `RenderFragment<TreeView<T>.TreeViewItem<T>>?` | `` |  |
| TreeViewNode | LoadChildren | `Func<TreeView<T>.TreeViewItem<T>, Task<List<TreeView<T>.TreeViewItem<T>>>>?` | `` |  |
| TreeViewNode | OnExpandChanged | `EventCallback<TreeView<T>.TreeViewItem<T>>` | `` |  |
| TreeViewNode | OnSelectionChanged | `EventCallback<TreeView<T>.TreeViewItem<T>>` | `` |  |
| TreeViewNode | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| TreeViewNode | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |

## Slots
- `NodeTemplate` (TreeView) — RenderFragment slot
- `NodeTemplate` (TreeViewNode) — RenderFragment slot

## Events
- `OnItemClick` (`EventCallback<TreeViewItem<T>>`)
- `OnItemCheck` (`EventCallback<TreeViewItem<T>>`)
- `CheckedValuesChanged` (`EventCallback<List<T?>>`)
- `SelectedValuesChanged` (`EventCallback<List<T>>`)

## Sub-components
- `TreeViewNode`

## Cascading values it expects
- `Context` (`TreeView<T>.TreeViewContext?`)

## Services it injects
- `ILumeoLocalizer` (Lumeo.Services.Localization)
- `IComponentInteropService` (Lumeo.Services)
- `IComponentInteropService` ()

## Keyboard
—

## Example
```razor
<TreeView />
```

## CSS variables
`--color-accent`, `--color-accent-foreground`, `--color-input`, `--color-muted`, `--color-muted-foreground`, `--color-ring`, `--radius`

## Files
- `UI/TreeView/TreeView.razor`
- `UI/TreeView/TreeViewNode.razor`
